title: Let it go
lyrics:
I see it coming, you know The end of all the shit that you want to throw
away The end of all the shit that fucks up your day
The end of all the reasons why you'd walk away, you know
Just tellin' you this once Just rollin' down until you want to touch yeh
Till you wanna burn it, burn it up on me And I want you to be more than you wanna be
set free No more control in this level, ayy
No more diamond ring on the kettle, ayy No more meant to be with me
It's not like we're just sitting here family, nah
Gotta understand that life gets short And people walk up in and out the door
But you know that it gets there All of it's just a smear
Campaigning what you wanna not be doing Campaigning what you wanna who be screwing
And you know you're just a bit of that You're just a piece of the puzzle and you
get away with that Don't test me, don't wreck me
Got bullets for days if you arrest me If you understand what I mean
I'm talking vocal collections and seems When it's down the middle and you see
Left to right, which wasy is thee  Are you here, are you there?
Are you falling past to the beam? In the ka-tet you know I'm sitting there
rowing Got drawn by three, Eddie and Roland
kick it  back to you and to know that this Is everybody's gift for you, just remiss, ayy
Got the whole storyteller with bliss Coming down with me and we know we go five nights
Next to me, on Christmas day Fuck it, another year, let's go boo aye
When we running hotter, well now Can it get harder than that?
Like a candle jump for me Like a candle jump for you
I'm not a chump and I'm not here to screw But if you want to, well, what's the deal, yo?
Wanna have all experiences of all kinds But if you don't wanna be kind, you don't mind
Me when I say to back the fuck up When I say to back the fuck up
Don't waste time with me to back up And the best that you know
When you wanna get fucked up, ayy That would just save me a little bit more
Little energy inside, would you do the door? If I could sing a hook and chorus better
Then you know you want more, ayy When it comes
Don't come on me Do you have your ID?
